name: steam-engine
short_effect: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.
effect_text: Raises the user's Speed by three stages when it is hit by a Fire- or Water-type attack. The attack still deals damage.
flavor_text: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.
